hero.subtitle: Your home and your business never stop for lack of power again.

processo.title: From simulation to installation — no surprises.

steps.title: Simulation & Contact
steps.copy: Use the simulator at the top of the page. Our team calls you back in under 24 hours.

steps.title: Technical Survey
steps.copy: A precise on-site visit to assess your roof and consumption. Cost of 5,000 CVE (100% deductible from the contract).

steps.title: Protection Plan
steps.copy: You receive a transparent final proposal with the exact calculation of your solar production, savings and payback.

steps.title: Installation & Connection
steps.copy: Precise technical assembly by certified professionals with live load testing. Your life doesn't stop.

impactoDia.title: The impact on your daily life

items.title: Don't stop cooking.
items.copy: Fridge and freezer always on. Zero food waste.

items.title: Don't stop working.
items.copy: Active Wi-Fi, charged computers and lighting to work or study.

items.title: Air conditioning without guilt.
items.copy: Use cooling during the hottest hours knowing the sun pays the bill.

finalCta.title: The grid fails. Cabo Energia doesn't.
finalCta.subtitle: The initial assessment is free and with no commitment.

solucoes.title: Your level of energy, your choice.

residencial.promise: The sun pays your electricity bill, every month.
Plenty of energy for the whole home.
Total independence — live as if ELECTRA didn't exist.

negocio.promise: Your business never stops. Your bill drops.
